description: Pearson / Spearman / Kendall correlation matrix across numeric columns, emitted as a long-form or wide-form DataFrame asset.

inputs.description: Upstream DataFrame containing the numeric columns to correlate

outputs.description: Long-form (field1, field2, correlation) or wide-form correlation matrix

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream asset key providing a DataFrame

columns.label: Columns
columns.description: Numeric columns to correlate. If omitted, all numeric columns are used.

min_periods.label: Min Periods
min_periods.description: Minimum number of observations required per pair of columns
